elements.name: Sticky Note
elements.description: Add notes and annotations to your workflow

elements.name: Start
elements.description: Workflow entry point — opens the chat session

elements.name: AI Agent
elements.description: Configurable AI agent for workflow tasks

configFields.label: Instructions
configFields.defaultValue: You are a helpful AI assistant.
configFields.placeholder: What the agent should do, including goals and constraints…

configFields.label: Previous Steps
configFields.helpText: Select outputs from earlier nodes to pass to this agent.

configFields.label: Uploaded Files
configFields.helpText: Allow access to files uploaded by the user in earlier nodes.

configFields.label: Web Search
configFields.helpText: Allow the agent to search the web. Turn on Deep Research below for multi-agent research.

configFields.label: Deep Research
configFields.helpText: Multi-agent deep research with parallel subagents and citations.

configFields.label: Knowledge Bases
configFields.helpText: Give the agent access to one or more knowledge bases.

configFields.label: Knowledge Bases
configFields.helpText: Select knowledge bases for this agent.

configFields.label: Startup message
configFields.placeholder: Message shown before the agent runs. Leave empty to auto-run.

configFields.label: Show Reasoning
configFields.helpText: Display agent reasoning to the user while the agent is running.

configFields.label: Delivery Mode
configFields.helpText: Autonomous: agent decides when to produce output. Interactive: user decides. One-shot: agent produces output immediately using available inputs.

configFields.label: Allow Multi-Choice Qs
configFields.helpText: Lets the agent request clarification in multiple-choice format. Always on for Interactive delivery mode.

configFields.label: Output schema
configFields.placeholder: Define the structure of the output (free text if empty)…

configFields.label: Name
configFields.helpText: Deliverable name for downstream nodes.

configFields.label: Hide Deliverable from Chat
configFields.helpText: When enabled, this agent's deliverable will not be displayed in the chat view. The deliverable is still generated and stored — it just won't be visible to the user.

configFields.label: Creativity
configFields.helpText: Low = more deterministic, high = more creative.

configFields.label: Max tokens
configFields.helpText: Maximum response length.

elements.name: Code Runner
elements.description: Run Python code in a secure sandbox. Takes deliverables as input, returns typed outputs (data, charts, files, interactive widgets).

configFields.label: Input Mappings
configFields.helpText: Feed data from upstream nodes into your script. Each row maps a variable name (left) to a source path (right). Your code reads them via inputs["variable_name"].

configFields.label: Knowledge Bases
configFields.helpText: Select one or more Knowledge Bases whose structured tables should be queryable from your code via agent_studio.knowledge_base. Tables you can drag and drop into the editor come from these KBs, and the AI code generator uses their schemas to write accurate queries.

configFields.label: Runtime User Inputs (optional)
configFields.helpText: Add fields that the user fills in at runtime before the code runs. Values arrive in inputs["runtime"]. Leave empty to skip.

configFields.label: Startup Message
configFields.helpText: Message shown in the chat when this executor starts. Leave empty to run immediately.

configFields.label: Auto-execute when reached
configFields.helpText: When enabled, this node fires automatically the moment the workflow reaches it — including when it is the entry point of the workflow (opens the session and runs without waiting for a chat message). Does not bypass in-code pauses from output.ask(), output.selection(), output.form(), or runtime-input forms — those are controlled by your script.

configFields.label: Extra Allowed Imports
configFields.helpText: Packages beyond the safe default list (pandas, numpy, matplotlib, etc.).

configFields.label: Upstream Deliverables Access
configFields.helpText: Choose which previous nodes' deliverables this code runner can read. Use Input Mappings above to wire specific data into your script.

configFields.label: Hide Deliverable from Chat
configFields.helpText: When enabled, this code runner's output will not be displayed in the chat view. The output is still generated and stored — it just won't be visible to the user.

elements.name: PowerPoint Generator
elements.description: Send selected workflow deliverables to Edwin and open the slide editor.

configFields.label: Previous Steps
configFields.helpText: Select outputs from earlier nodes to include in the Edwin handoff.

configFields.label: Hide Deliverable from Chat
configFields.helpText: Edwin opens automatically; only the continuation message is shown in chat.

elements.name: Route
elements.description: Branch the workflow based on expressions over previous node outputs

configFields.label: Routes
configFields.helpText: Define routes using expressions. Access previous node outputs with: input.deliverable.fieldName or node.{nodeId}.deliverable.fieldName

elements.name: Human Review
elements.description: Human review and approval of workflow output

configFields.label: Require explicit approval
configFields.helpText: Reviewer must approve before the workflow continues. Turn off to allow continue without an explicit approve action.

configFields.label: Allow content editing
configFields.helpText: Lets the reviewer change deliverable content during review, not only approve or reject as-is.

configFields.label: Review Instructions
configFields.defaultValue: Please review and approve the content before continuing.
